## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Mo Jahama for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves editorial oversight, project management, and AI workflow optimization for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Mo has extensive experience in AI-driven content creation, SEO, and client management across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on editorial blog content (5-10 pieces/week) and SEO content (25-100 pieces) using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Company is refining its ICP and moving towards more standardized content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Technical Managing Editor manages 3-5 clients within a pod structure](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Responsibilities include:](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Editorial oversight (tone, brand voice, technical accuracy)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [Project management (content production, client communication)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [AI workflow optimization (feedback loop with product team)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Works alongside 1-3 content managers who run underlying AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### GrowthX Services and Content Types

  - [Primary focus: Editorial blog content (5-10 pieces/week) and SEO content (25-100 pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Additional services:](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Content refreshes for large existing content libraries (1000+ blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [Template-based content generation (e.g., product comparisons, glossary pages)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Emphasis on human-in-the-loop approach for AI content production](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Mo's Experience and Interest

  - [Extensive work with AI content generation systems and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Experience in building prototypes and client-facing demos](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Strong background in SEO, content strategy, and working across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Keen interest in leveraging technical expertise with creativity in AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Client Goals and Challenges

  - [Main client objectives: Improve SEO rankings and LLM visibility/citations](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Varying client needs based on existing content and understanding of content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Challenges in educating clients on realistic timelines for building web presence](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Experimentation with new tactics for generative engine optimization (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Standardized 5-7 step workflow with customizable prompts for each client](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Utilization of different AI models (e.g., Claude, Perplexity) based on specific strengths](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Ongoing experimentation and optimization of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Focus on creating niche, specific content to target high-intent customers](https://fathom.video/share/67ixoskgcaBT1MBxS5BYBUp4KjgCcb-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - Schedule follow-up interview with another team member
  - Further discuss GrowthX's AI pipelines and workflows
  - Explore Mo's potential contributions to workflow optimization and client strategy
